summary: Both legs PASS. Merge fields round-trip as REAL Word field codes (w:fldSimple / w:fldChar MERGEFIELD), NOT w:sdt content controls — validated against the user's actual Word 16.

legA_clone_to_word.input: C:/tmp/wc-slice10-clone.docx (clone-authored via scripts/author-slice10-mm-clone-probe.js: MERGEFIELD x2 [FirstName, Last_Name] + ADDRESSBLOCK + GREETINGLINE + NEXT)
legA_clone_to_word.roundtrip: word-oracle-win.ps1 roundtrip -> ROUNDTRIP_OK (real Word opened it with NO repair prompt and resaved to C:/tmp/wc-slice10-resaved.docx)
legA_clone_to_word.notes: Word canonicalized the compact w:fldSimple form to the verbose w:fldChar/w:instrText form on resave (benign — both represent the same live field). ALL 5 merge field codes preserved; underscore field name (Last_Name) intact. NO w:sdt content-control leak in either file; NO spurious «Next Record» result run for NEXT.

legB_word_to_clone.evidence: scripts/test-suite-pm.js '[10mm] IMPORT (Leg B, real Word fixture)' loads C:/tmp/wc-slice10-mergefields.docx (authored in real Word via Fields.Add) through PM.openDocx and asserts MERGEFIELD «FirstName»/«Last_Name» + GREETINGLINE + ADDRESSBLOCK + NEXT all import as fieldAnnotation nodes with the correct fieldType. PASS in the PM gate (285/285).
legB_word_to_clone.notes: The fork importer additions (mergefield-preprocessor + sd:mergeField NodeTranslator + generateV2HandlerEntity in docxImporter) turn Word's w:fldSimple AND w:fldChar MERGEFIELD/ADDRESSBLOCK/GREETINGLINE/NEXT into fieldAnnotation PM nodes, flag-independently (not gated on editor.options.annotations).

recorded_deviations: Rule-field IF/FILLIN/ASK/SKIPIF/SET export as STRUCTURALLY VALID field codes and round-trip, but Word's IF operator syntax ('=' / '<>') is not mapped from the legacy 'Equal to' label — an IF won't auto-evaluate in Word yet (ledger C, D10.9). MERGEFIELD/GREETINGLINE/ADDRESSBLOCK/NEXT are full-fidelity.

A previewed/merged ADDRESSBLOCK/GREETINGLINE imported from Word comes in as the «...» placeholder, not the rendered multi-line text (the import encode reconstructs the label from the instruction, discarding cached runs). A plain MERGEFIELD is lossless (ledger C, D10.12).
Envelopes/labels page geometry + Labels-Print + updateLabels «Next Record» propagation are pagination-gated (Phase 7, ledger A); PM paths insert real content or toast, never the legacy editor.
